name: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co.
description: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. is a global insurance brokerage, risk management, and consulting services firm headquartered in Rolling Meadows, Illinois. Founded in 1927, the company provides insurance brokerage, risk management, and third-party administration services to businesses, organizations, and individuals worldwide. Operating in dozens of countries, Gallagher helps clients manage risk, protect assets, and optimize benefit programs through its extensive network of professional advisors.
